since_last: 38% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.54%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.68% · BTC +0.65% · Gold -2.50% · Nasdaq100 -1.76%. 38% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.54%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.54%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.59%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +12.76%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +12.76%, INTU +7.32%, WDAY +4.96%, CRM +4.77%, SNOW +4.00%. Laggards: APP -10.64%, MRVL -7.71%, ARM -7.57%, SMR -7.30%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.37% at $137.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
